SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.api

Interface IRiskScore.IDeduction.IScope

All Known Implementing Classes:
RiskScore.Scope
Enclosing interface:
IRiskScore.IDeduction
public static interface IRiskScore.IDeduction.IScope
Scope metadata for a deduction, describing the protocol layer, affected TLS versions, and specific mechanism being checked.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getAspect()
    Specific mechanism being checked (e.g., "renegotiation", "ocsp", "hsts").
    String
    getLayer()
    Service/protocol layer (e.g., "tls", "certificate", "revocation", "http", "dns", "server").
    String[]
    getProtocols()
    TLS versions affected by this rule (e.g., "TLSv1.2", "TLSv1.3").

  • Method Details

    • getLayer

      String getLayer()
      Service/protocol layer (e.g., "tls", "certificate", "revocation", "http", "dns", "server"). Never null when scope is defined.
      Returns:
      Layer string

    • getProtocols

      String[] getProtocols()
      TLS versions affected by this rule (e.g., "TLSv1.2", "TLSv1.3"). Returns an empty array if the rule is not version-specific.
      Returns:
      Array of protocol version strings

    • getAspect

      String getAspect()
      Specific mechanism being checked (e.g., "renegotiation", "ocsp", "hsts"). Returns null if not specified.
      Returns:
      Aspect string, or null
